rationale: Keep: the citing paper explicitly positions itself as an extension of prior "data enrichment" work, and the cited paper is a core methodological contribution on Bayesian fusion of aggregate and disaggregate data—high topical/method overlap with the citing paper’s enrichment framework. With a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmr.11.0431), this looks plausibly foundational/method-source rather than an incidental mention.
